versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   opensearch-3-3-2                true
versions.deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: opensearch
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: opensearch-3-3-2
      name: opensearch
      namespace: opensearch
      values: |
        opensearch:
          persistence:
            enabled: false
          extraEnvs:
            - name: OPENSEARCH_INITIAL_ADMIN_PASSWORD
              value: xyIah87x!xzQ
          singleNode: true
